title: GitHub issue not getting created from anshimitt telegram
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

GitHub issue not getting created from anshimitt telegram

---

**Category:** `bug`
**Source:** Telegram Bot
**Status:** Pending implementation

> _This issue was created automatically via the BabyBloom Telegram Bot. No private baby data is included._
enhanced_description:
User reports that GitHub issues are not being created when submitted from the anshimitt Telegram account.
- The Telegram bot receives the message but the pipeline fails to create the corresponding GitHub issue.
- Affected component: bot.js and/or pipeline.sh — the issue creation flow from Telegram to GitHub.
- Expected: submitting a bug/feature via Telegram should create a GitHub issue automatically.
- Check bot.js for user allowlist or authorization logic, and pipeline.sh for any errors in the gh CLI calls.
- Acceptance criteria: issues submitted from the anshimitt Telegram account are successfully created on GitHub.
failure_reason:
This is a configuration issue, not a code bug. The bot.js isAllowed() function checks msg.from.username against the ALLOWED_USERS env var (loaded from bot/.env). The username "anshimitt" is likely not in that comma-separated list.

FIX REQUIRED (manual): Edit bot/.env and add "anshimitt" to the ALLOWED_USERS variable, then restart the bot. Example: ALLOWED_USERS=existinguser1,existinguser2,anshimitt

The Infrastructure Agent cannot edit .env files per safety rules.
implementation_notes: Analysis: The Telegram bot uses an allowlist (ALLOWED_USERS env var) to restrict who can create issues. The username "anshimitt" needs to be added to this list in bot/.env. This is a 1-line config change that must be done manually on the Mac where the bot runs. After editing .env, restart the bot (launchctl kickstart the plist or kill/restart the node process).

title: on long press in nurse on home page, time shows twice in the recent section
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

on long press in nurse on home page, time shows twice in the recent section

---

**Category:** `bug`
**Source:** Telegram Bot
**Status:** Pending implementation

> _This issue was created automatically via the BabyBloom Telegram Bot. No private baby data is included._
enhanced_description:
User reports that when long-pressing the Nurse button on the home page, the time is displayed twice in the Recent section.
- The nursing/home page component shows a duplicate time entry after a long-press interaction.
- Affected component: likely the NursingPage or HomePage component in src/, specifically the recent-logs rendering logic.
- Expected: a single time entry should appear in the Recent section after logging via long press.
- Edge cases: check both left/right breast long-press, and ensure normal tap does not also exhibit the issue.
- Acceptance criteria: long-pressing Nurse on the home page results in exactly one time entry in the Recent section.
implementation_notes:
Fix: duplicate time display in long-press info panel Recent section.
- Files changed: src/tabs/HomeTab.tsx — line ~1650 in the qlInfoPanel history rendering
- Root cause: both entry.amount (e.g. "10 min") and entry.mins (e.g. 10) were rendered simultaneously for timed nursing entries, showing the duration twice
- Fix: added !entry.amount guard to the entry.mins render, so mins only shows when amount is absent
- Trade-off: none — amount is the formatted display string and always takes precedence when present
